subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, O my Lord!  Thou beholdest Thy loved ones, attracted to Thy Abha Kingdom, enkindled in their inmost being
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری احبتک المنجذبین الی ملکوتک الابهی و المتاججین الضلوع و الاحشاء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @growth of the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
